name: Artichoke Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wooden salad bowl, mash the garlic and salt with a fork.
2. Add the fresh artichoke hearts and continue to mash until combined.
3. Stir in the olive oil.
4. Add lemon juice and stir.
5. Add wine vinegar and stir.
6. Add hot sauce and stir.
7. Add Lea & Perrins Worcestershire sauce and mix well.
8. Place canned artichoke hearts into the dressing and let marinate for 1 hour.
9. Serve as is or on a bed of greens.
